description: Style NoteFlowery and flouncy for the summer, catwalk serves up another stylish sandal for women. We love the blue colour and the innovative design details on this pair!Product DetailsSynthetic toe holder and a fabric footbedAnkle strap with a buckleDiagonal strap made of ruched fabric connecting the toe holder and the back strapTPU outsole with a floral lug at the heelMaterial and CareSynthetic, fabricDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
